creator: george@m5p.com
text: The patch from comment #297 crashes almost immediately after booting, just after leaving the beastie boot menu, possibly during loading if_re.ko.  There don't seem to be enough remnants of the crash to trigger a dump, so all I have is a JPEG which is too big to attach here, so I have put it in the same old directory on my system (IMG_20241225_142054307_HDR.jpg).
